data.biography:
Ashi Peerakan Teawsuewan is an actor and singer under GMMTV. He is currently attending Satri Chaiyaphum School.

He started in the entertainment industry in 2021 when he participated in the competition show "To Be Number One Idol 11". He is also known for participating in GMMTV's reality survival show "Project Alpha" in 2022.  In 2024, Ashi made his acting debut with a guest role in the series "Cherry Magic".

In November 2025, he was revealed as a member of the boy group CLO'VER under Riser Music.
data.name: Peerakan Teawsuwan
พีระกานต์ เตียวสุวรรณ
